long_description:
[TEL] NGDC non-cluster systemd fluentbit-logs no output records is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/tel_host_logging_agent_troubleshooting.html
TIP Short Description: NGDC non-cluster systemd fluentbit-logs on host vpc-jumphost-1-ngdc-staging has no output records for the past 1 hour
TIP Situation: NGDC non-cluster systemd fluentbit-logs no output records
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-platform-integration:::mgmt:host:vpc-jumphost-1-ngdc-staging

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
    avg by (host_hostname, agent_tag_cluster, agent_tag_cluster_type) (increase(fluentbit_output_proc_records_total{ name="output_log_router_icl_ops_logs", program_cmd_line="/usr/bin/fluent-bit -c /etc/fluent-bit/conf/ops-logs/fluent.conf", agent_tag_cluster=""}[1m])) < 1 = 0
Segment:
    agent_tag_cluster_type = 'mgmt' and host_hostname = 'vpc-jumphost-1-ngdc-staging'

Time:             12/07/2025 09:54 PM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://us-south.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/910302c05d5e49f791b39ccad7167b2b/31cd1241-2f66-4bbc-ae24-1fd27bd261a5?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F179643646%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [TEL] NGDC non-cluster systemd fluentbit-logs no output records
Description:  NGDC non-cluster systemd fluentbit-logs on reported host has no output records for the past 1 hour

Duration: 1 h
